title: sidalcea keckii
intro: Sidalcea keckii, also known as the wavy-leaved checkermallow, is a flowering plant in the mallow family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to aid in wound healing, reducing pain and swelling. The health benefits of Sidalcea keckii include its potential to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Sidalcea keckii is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
